::: {.section-card} ::: {.timeline-list} ::: {.timeline-item}
Data Science Intern — GoTo
2025
Worked on data science initiatives related to credit risk analysis, model monitoring, and financial data workflows. Contributed to analytical processes that supported risk evaluation and data-driven decision making. ::: ::: {.timeline-item}
Corporate Development Intern — GoTo
2024
Supported strategic and market research projects through analysis of business trends, industry materials, and financial information. Helped prepare research and presentation materials used for broader strategic discussion. ::: ::: {.timeline-item}
President — Indonesian Bruin Student Association
UCLA
Led student programming, planning, and coordination efforts while supporting community engagement on campus. Worked across teams to organize events, manage responsibilities, and strengthen student involvement. ::: ::: {.timeline-item}
Data Journalist — Bruin Sports Analytics
UCLA
Created sports-focused analytical content that combined data, storytelling, and visual communication. Used quantitative methods to explore performance patterns and present findings in a clear and engaging way. ::: ::: ::: ::: {.section-card} ## Academic Background As a UCLA Statistics and Data Science student, I have completed work in statistical learning, regression modeling, experimental design, inference, and data analysis. My academic projects apply machine learning methods, classification models, and statistical testing to real-world datasets. ::: ::: {.section-card} ## Tools R, Python, SQL, Excel, Kubeflow, QuickBI, Quarto, and data visualization workflows for research, reporting, and presentation. :::
